_comment: Ground truth for the M6.2 demo job (maintainer-authored; geometry facts verified from the committed l-bracket.step bytes per the provenance rule, DECISIONS.md 2026-07-04). The CLI integration test asserts the geometry facts exactly and the run facts as BEHAVIORAL INVARIANTS - no compliance or stress values are pinned (they depend on iteration count and solver tolerances; the physics gates V1-V5 already pin the numerics elsewhere).

l-bracket.step.hole_axes: both +Z, centers (x,y) = (-17,0) and (9,0), through the mounting plate z in [-16, 0]
l-bracket.step.geometry: L-bracket: mounting plate 60 x 40 x 16 (z in [-16,0]) with two O5 through-holes; upright wall 8 thick (x in [22,30]) x 40 deep x 84 tall (z in [-16,68]).
l-bracket.step.tessellated_volume_note: OPPOSITE of the cylinder fixture: the curved surfaces here are HOLES, so chordal tessellation makes the holes smaller and the SOLID volume LARGER than analytic. Tessellated volume approaches 59531.68... FROM ABOVE as deflection tightens; do not assert 'below analytic'.

cli_run_invariants.fixture_face_match: the cylindrical selector matches exactly 2 faces
cli_run_invariants.expected_outcome: accept-all: real PLA under self-weight at this scale has an enormous margin on every rung (handoff 028's warning states this explicitly), so ALL THREE ladder rungs are accepted, stopped_on_margin = false, and the report holds exactly 3 variants with volume fractions descending [0.7, 0.5, 0.3] (each within 0.01 of its request).
cli_run_invariants.orientation: every variant reports build direction [0, 0, 1] (unit negation of the job's gravity direction)
cli_run_invariants.margins: every variant's worst-case margin > margin_stop (1.5) by a large factor; the margin fields are numbers or null per the M5.2 schema - do not pin values
cli_run_invariants.settings_prediction: with margins far above 4.0 and max part dimension 84 mm (size class medium, no modifier), every variant gets rules.json's final band exactly: walls 2, top_layers 4, bottom_layers 3, infill 15% grid - a strong, fully determined check of the rules wiring
cli_run_invariants.report: the written report.json passes validate_job_report; material = 'PLA'; min_feature fields present per M5.2b
cli_run_invariants.meshes: one exported mesh per accepted variant (3 files), each re-importable with the M6.1 reader: watertight, single connected component, nonzero volume, volume within 0.5% of the in-memory variant mesh
cli_run_invariants.determinism: two CLI runs on this job produce byte-identical report.json
